2026-04-17T09:24:27.7976358Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-17T09:24:27.7976787Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-17T09:24:27.7977150Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-17T09:24:27.7977452Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-17T09:24:27.7977683Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-17T09:24:27.7977837Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-17T09:24:27.7978010Z [36;1m[0m

2026-04-17T09:24:27.7978398Z [36;1m{[0m

2026-04-17T09:24:27.7978867Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-17T09:24:27.7979116Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m

2026-04-17T09:27:46.4627317Z {"timestamp":"2026-04-17T09:25:34.974504705Z","direction":"IN","type":"RESPONSE","server_id":"github","payload":{"id":1,"jsonrpc":"2.0","result":{"content":[{"text":"{\"number\":58277,\"title\":\"[DataBox] Docs: Fix incorrect service description and add code samples to README\",\"body\":\"## Documentation Gap\\n\\n**Package:** `Azure.ResourceManager.DataBox`\\n**Service directory:** `sdk/databox/Azure.ResourceManager.DataBox/`\\n**Triggered by:** PR #57614 (commit 18df8671) by `@haiyuazhang`\\n\\n## What Changed\\n\\nPR #57614 introduced an MPG (Management Plane Generator) migration for the Azure Data Box package, regenerating it from TypeSpec. The migration added new generated sources, custom model overrides, and set up the `1.2.0-beta.1` version. However, the README was migrated with documentation issues.\\n\\n## Gaps Found\\n\\n- **Incorrect service description** (copy-paste error): `README.md` line 7 reads *\\u0026#34;This library supports managing Microsoft Azure Customer Insights resources.\\u0026#34;* — it should describe Azure Data Box resources, not Customer Insights.\\n- **Empty Key concepts section**: The `## Key concepts` section links only to the generic Azure SDK intro page. It should describe the primary types: `DataBoxJobResource`, `DataBoxJobCollection`, and the extension methods on `ResourceGroupResource` and `SubscriptionResource`.\\n- **No inline code samples**: The `## Examples` section contains no C# code snippets — only a link to generic management library samples. At minimum it should show how to authenticate/create a client, list Data Box jobs in a subscription, and get/create a Data Box job.\\n- **No sample test file**: There is no `tests/Samples/` directory or any `Sample*.cs` test file to back the README snippets via the repo\\u0026#39;s snippet-generation tooling.\\n- **Empty CHANGELOG for 1.2.0-beta.1**: The new version section has empty `### Features Added`, `### Breaking Changes`, etc. subsections, with no notes reflecting the TypeSpec migration.\\n\\n\\n\\u003cstrong\\u003e📐 Implementation Guide\\u003c/strong\\u003e\\n\\nThis section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above.\\n\\n### Step 1: Modify files\\n\\n#### Fix the incorrect description in README.md\\n\\n**File:** `sdk/databox/Azure.ResourceManager.DataBox/README.md`  \\n**Action:** Edit\\n\\nReplace:\\n```markdown\\nThis library supports managing Microsoft Azure Customer Insights resources.\\n```\\nWith:\\n```markdown\\nThis library supports managing Microsoft Azure Data Box resources.\\n```\\n\\n#### Expand the Key concepts section in README.md\\n\\n**File:** `sdk/databox/Azure.ResourceManager.DataBox/README.md`  \\n**Action:** Edit — replace the existing `## Key concepts` section body with:\\n\\n```markdown\\n## Key concepts\\n\\n### DataBoxJobResource\\n\\n`DataBoxJobResource` represents a single Azure Data Box job and provides operations to get, update, cancel, and delete the job, as well as to retrieve shipping labels and delivery information.\\n\\n### DataBoxJobCollection\\n\\n`DataBoxJobCollection` provides operations to list and create Data Box jobs scoped to a resource group.\\n\\n### Extension methods\\n\\n`DataBoxExtensions` adds helper methods to:\\n- `ResourceGroupResource` — retrieve a `DataBoxJobCollection`, get a single job by name, list available SKUs, validate inputs, and get region configuration.\\n- `SubscriptionResource` — enumerate all Data Box jobs across the subscription, validate addresses, and get region configuration.\\n\\n### Thread safety and additional concepts\\n\\nAll client instance methods are thread-safe. See [Azure.Core concepts](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/sdk/core/Azure.Core/README.md) for client options, response access, retry policies, and logging.\\n```\\n\\n#### Add a snippet placeholder to the Examples section\\n\\n**File:** `sdk/databox/Azure.ResourceManager.DataBox/README.md`  \\n**Action:** Edit — replace the existing `## Examples` section with:\\n\\n```markdown\\n## Examples\\n\\n### Authenticate the client and get all Data Box jobs in a subscription\\n\\n```\\n```\\n```\\n\\n#### Update CHANGELOG for 1.2.0-beta.1\\n\\n**File:** `sdk/databox/Azure.ResourceManager.DataBox/CHANGELOG.md`  \\n**Action:** Edit — populate the empty `## 1.2.0-beta.1 (Unreleased)` section:\\n\\n```markdown\\n## 1.2.0-beta.1 (Unreleased)\\n\\n### Other Changes\\n\\n- Migrated SDK generation from AutoRest to TypeSpec (Management Plane Generator).\\n```\\n\\n### Step 2: Add or update code snippets\\n\\nCreate a new sample test file:\\n\\n**File:** `sdk/databox/Azure.ResourceManager.DataBox/tests/Samples/Sample1_ListDataBoxJobs.cs`  \\n**Action:** Create\\n\\n```csharp\\n// Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.\\n// Licensed under the MIT License.\\n\\nusing System;\\nusing System.Threading.Tasks;\\nusing Azure.Identity;\\nusing Azure.ResourceManager;\\nusing Azure.ResourceManager.DataBox;\\nusing NUnit.Framework;\\n\\nnamespace Azure.ResourceManager.DataBox.Tests.Samples\\n{\\n    public class Sample1_ListDataBoxJobs : SamplesBase\\n    {\\n        [Test]\\n        [AsyncOnly]\\n        public async Task ListJobsAsync()\\n        {\\n            #region Snippet:DataBox_ListJobs\\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\\n            var subscription = await client.GetDefaultSubscriptionAsync();\\n\\n            await foreach (DataBoxJobResource job in subscription.GetDataBoxJobsAsync())\\n            {\\n                Console.WriteLine($\\u0026#34;Job: {job.Data.Name}, Status: {job.Data.Status}\\u0026#34;);\\n            }\\n            #endregion\\n        }\\n    }\\n}\\n```\\n\\nAdd the snippet placeholder to the README (see Step 1 above) at the `## Examples` section:\\n\\n```\\n```\\n```\\n```\\n\\nThe `Update-Snippets.ps1` script will automatically populate this block with the code from the `#region Snippet:DataBox_ListJobs` / `#endregion` markers in the test file.\\n\\n### Step 3: Verify README structure\\n\\nCurrent README section order is correct. The following sections need content changes per this issue:\\n\\n| Section | Status | Action |\\n|---|---|---|\\n| Getting started — Install the package | ✅ OK | None |\\n| Getting started — Prerequisites | ✅ OK | None |\\n| Getting started — Authenticate the client | ✅ OK (links to quickstart) | None |\\n| Key concepts | ⚠️ Generic only | Add resource type descriptions (Step 1) |\\n| Examples | ⚠️ No inline code | Add snippet placeholder + sample test (Steps 1 \\u0026amp; 2) |\\n| Troubleshooting | ✅ OK | None |\\n| Next steps | ✅ OK | None |\\n| Contributing | ✅ OK | None |\\n\\nReference: `sdk/keyvault/Azure.Security.KeyVault.Secrets/README.md`\\n\\n### Step 4: Validate\\n\\nRun these commands in order:\\n\\n1. `dotnet build sdk/databox/Azure.ResourceManager.DataBox/`\\n2. `dotnet test sdk/databox/Azure.ResourceManager.DataBox/ --filter TestCategory!=Live`\\n3. `eng/scripts/Update-Snippets.ps1 databox` — verify that the README is updated with the snippet content\\n4. `eng/scripts/Export-API.ps1 databox` — regenerate public API listing if any public types changed\\n5. `dotnet format sdk/databox/Azure.ResourceManager.DataBox/`\\n\\n\\n\\n## Next Steps\\n\\n\\u0026gt; 2026-04-17T09:27:46.4801950Z {"timestamp":"2026-04-17T09:26:43.760105248Z","direction":"IN","type":"RESPONSE","server_id":"github","payload":{"id":1,"jsonrpc":"2.0","result":{"content":[{"text":"{\"total_count\":1,\"incomplete_results\":false,\"items\":[{\"id\":4281511073,\"number\":58277,\"state\":\"open\",\"locked\":false,\"title\":\"[DataBox] Docs: Fix incorrect service description and add code samples to README\",\"body\":\"## Documentation Gap\\n\\n**Package:** `Azure.ResourceManager.DataBox`\\n**Service directory:** `sdk/databox/Azure.ResourceManager.DataBox/`\\n**Triggered by:** PR #57614 (commit 18df8671) by `@haiyuazhang`\\n\\n## What Changed\\n\\nPR #57614 introduced an MPG (Management Plane Generator) migration for the Azure Data Box package, regenerating it from TypeSpec. The migration added new generated sources, custom model overrides, and set up the `1.2.0-beta.1` version. However, the README was migrated with documentation issues.\\n\\n## Gaps Found\\n\\n- **Incorrect service description** (copy-paste error): `README.md` line 7 reads *\\\"This library supports managing Microsoft Azure Customer Insights resources.\\\"* — it should describe Azure Data Box resources, not Customer Insights.\\n- **Empty Key concepts section**: The `## Key concepts` section links only to the generic Azure SDK intro page. It should describe the primary types: `DataBoxJobResource`, `DataBoxJobCollection`, and the extension methods on `ResourceGroupResource` and `SubscriptionResource`.\\n- **No inline code samples**: The `## Examples` section contains no C# code snippets — only a link to generic management library samples. At minimum it should show how to authenticate/create a client, list Data Box jobs in a subscription, and get/create a Data Box job.\\n- **No sample test file**: There is no `tests/Samples/` directory or any `Sample*.cs` test file to back the README snippets via the repo's snippet-generation tooling.\\n- **Empty CHANGELOG for 1.2.0-beta.1**: The new version section has empty `### Features Added`, `### Breaking Changes`, etc. subsections, with no notes reflecting the TypeSpec migration.\\n\\n\\u003cdetails\\u003e\\n\\u003csummary\\u003e\\u003cstrong\\u003e📐 Implementation Guide\\u003c/strong\\u003e\\u003c/summary\\u003e\\n\\nThis section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above.\\n\\n### Step 1: Modify files\\n\\n#### Fix the incorrect description in README.md\\n\\n**File:** `sdk/databox/Azure.ResourceManager.DataBox/README.md`  \\n**Action:** Edit\\n\\nReplace:\\n```markdown\\nThis library supports managing Microsoft Azure Customer Insights resources.\\n```\\nWith:\\n```markdown\\nThis library supports managing Microsoft Azure Data Box resources.\\n```\\n\\n#### Expand the Key concepts section in README.md\\n\\n**File:** `sdk/databox/Azure.ResourceManager.DataBox/README.md`  \\n**Action:** Edit — replace the existing `## Key concepts` section body with:\\n\\n```markdown\\n## Key concepts\\n\\n### DataBoxJobResource\\n\\n`DataBoxJobResource` represents a single Azure Data Box job and provides operations to get, update, cancel, and delete the job, as well as to retrieve shipping labels and delivery information.\\n\\n### DataBoxJobCollection\\n\\n`DataBoxJobCollection` provides operations to list and create Data Box jobs scoped to a resource group.\\n\\n### Extension methods\\n\\n`DataBoxExtensions` adds helper methods to:\\n- `ResourceGroupResource` — retrieve a `DataBoxJobCollection`, get a single job by name, list available SKUs, validate inputs, and get region configuration.\\n- `SubscriptionResource` — enumerate all Data Box jobs across the subscription, validate addresses, and get region configuration.\\n\\n### Thread safety and additional concepts\\n\\nAll client instance methods are thread-safe. See [Azure.Core concepts](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/blob/main/sdk/core/Azure.Core/README.md) for client options, response access, retry policies, and logging.\\n```\\n\\n#### Add a snippet placeholder to the Examples section\\n\\n**File:** `sdk/databox/Azure.ResourceManager.DataBox/README.md`  \\n**Action:** Edit — replace the existing `## Examples` section with:\\n\\n```markdown\\n## Examples\\n\\n### Authenticate the client and get all Data Box jobs in a subscription\\n\\n```C# Snippet:DataBox_ListJobs\\n```\\n```\\n\\n#### Update CHANGELOG for 1.2.0-beta.1\\n\\n**File:** `sdk/databox/Azure.ResourceManager.DataBox/CHANGELOG.md`  \\n**Action:** Edit — populate the empty `## 1.2.0-beta.1 (Unreleased)` section:\\n\\n```markdown\\n## 1.2.0-beta.1 (Unreleased)\\n\\n### Other Changes\\n\\n- Migrated SDK generation from AutoRest to TypeSpec (Management Plane Generator).\\n```\\n\\n### Step 2: Add or update code snippets\\n\\nCreate a new sample test file:\\n\\n**File:** `sdk/databox/Azure.ResourceManager.DataBox/tests/Samples/Sample1_ListDataBoxJobs.cs`  \\n**Action:** Create\\n\\n```csharp\\n// Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.\\n// Licensed under the MIT License.\\n\\nusing System;\\nusing System.Threading.Tasks;\\nusing Azure.Identity;\\nusing Azure.ResourceManager;\\nusing Azure.ResourceManager.DataBox;\\nusing NUnit.Framework;\\n\\nnamespace Azure.ResourceManager.DataBox.Tests.Samples\\n{\\n    public class Sample1_ListDataBoxJobs : SamplesBase\\u003cDataBoxManagementTestEnvironment\\u003e\\n    {\\n        [Test]\\n        [AsyncOnly]\\n        public async Task ListJobsAsync()\\n        {\\n            #region Snippet:DataBox_ListJobs\\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\\n            var subscription = await client.GetDefaultSubscriptionAsync();\\n\\n            await foreach (DataBoxJobResource job in subscription.GetDataBoxJobsAsync())\\n            {\\n                Console.WriteLine($\\\"Job: {job.Data.Name}, Status: {job.Data.Status}\\\");\\n            }\\n            #endregion\\n        }\\n    }\\n}\\n```\\n\\nAdd the snippet placeholder to the README (see Step 1 above) at the `## Examples` section:\\n\\n```\\n```C# Snippet:DataBox_ListJobs\\n```\\n```\\n\\nThe `Update-Snippets.ps1` script will automatically populate this block with the code from the `#region Snippet:DataBox_ListJobs` / `#endregion` markers in the test file.\\n\\n### Step 3: Verify README structure\\n\\nCurrent README section order is correct. Examples | ⚠️ No inline code | Add snippet placeholder + sample test (Steps 1 \\u0026 2) |\\n| Troubleshooting | ✅ OK | None |\\n| Next steps | ✅ OK | None |\\n| Contributing | ✅ OK | None |\\n\\nReference: `sdk/keyvault/Azure.Security.KeyVault.Secrets/README.md`\\n\\n### Step 4: Validate\\n\\nRun these commands in order:\\n\\n1. `dotnet build README is updated with the snippet content\\n4. `eng/scripts/Export-API.ps1 databox` — regenerate public API listing if any public types changed\\n5. `dotnet format sdk/databox/Azure.ResourceManager.DataBox/`\\n\\n\\u003c/details\\u003e\\n\\n## Next Steps\\n\\n\\u003e [!TIP]\\n\\u003e **Ready for automated implementation?** Assign this issue to **`@copilot`** to
